title: Perl Weekly Challenge - 037
task1_desc: Write a script to calculate the total number of weekdays (Mon-Fri) in each month of the year 2019.
task1_body:
Write a script to calculate the total number of weekdays (Mon-Fri) in each month of the year 2019.

##### Jan: 23 days
##### Feb: 20 days
##### Mar: 21 days
##### Apr: 22 days
##### May: 23 days
##### Jun: 20 days
##### Jul: 23 days
##### Aug: 22 days
##### Sep: 21 days
##### Oct: 23 days
##### Nov: 21 days
##### Dec: 22 days
task2_desc: Write a script to find out the **DayLight** gain/loss in the month of **December 2019** as compared to **November 2019** in the city of **London**. You can find out sunrise and sunset data for [November 2019](https://www.timeanddate.com/sun/uk/london?month=11&year=2019) and [December 2019](https://www.timeanddate.com/sun/uk/london?month=12&year=2019) for **London**.
task2_body:
Write a script to find out the **DayLight** gain/loss in the month of **December 2019** as compared to **November 2019** in the city of **London**. You can find out sunrise and sunset data for [November 2019](https://www.timeanddate.com/sun/uk/london?month=11&year=2019) and [December 2019](https://www.timeanddate.com/sun/uk/london?month=12&year=2019) for **London**.

Last date to submit the solution **23:59 (UK Time) Sunday 8th December 2019**.
